attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT                                                                                                                                  
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                               
SCOOLA.LINE_ID,                                                                                                                                             
'CG' SS_CODE,                                                                                                                                    
NSOLT.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,                                                                                                                                           
NSOLT.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   ,                                                                                                                                       
NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,                                                                                                                                       
NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,                                                                                                                                 
CAST (SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) START_SSP_DATE,                                                                           
SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE START_TV_DATETIME,                   
'3500-01-01' END_SSP_DATE  ,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END_TV_DATETIME,                                                                                                                       
NULL AS DISPATCH_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME,                                                                                                                                           
NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME, /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                      
NULL AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,                                                                                                                                               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,                                                                                                                                     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,                                                                                                                                    
-999 AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                                                                                                                                         
NULL AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                      /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                         
'=' AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,        /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
COALESCE (GOODS_LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                          
COALESCE (NSOL_ASSEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                              
COALESCE (NSOL_SPLIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                      
NULL AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
SCOOLA.INVOICE_INTERFACE_STATUS_CODE ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD,                                                                                                                                         
SCOOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE AS SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,                                                                                                                                 
NULL BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
NULL AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,               /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
COALESCE (SCOOLA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,'=') AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,                                                                                                                                  
COALESCE(SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,                                                                                                                                    
NULL AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM,                   /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                      
ATTRIBUTE16 AS SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT,                                                                                                                                          
NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,                                                                                                                                     
'=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG,       /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                      
COALESCE (NSOL_TOP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                            
COALESCE (NSOL_CONFIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
'N' AS PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG,             /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
-7777 AS RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
'N' AS EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,                                                                                                                                           
NULL AS RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,                                                                                                                                    
CASE WHEN SCOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION IS NOT NULL  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,                                                                                                                                        
 case when COALESCE(SCOOLA.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'DAY' THEN  (SCOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION/365.00)*12.00 /*To convert days to months*/
 when COALESCE(SCOOLA.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'YR' THEN  (SCOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION)*12.00 /*To convert years to months*/
 ELSE SCOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION END as RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,                                                                                                                                              
SCOOLA.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE AS EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT,                                                                                                                                     
'UNKWOWN' AS SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,            /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                                      
COALESCE (SCOOLA.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,'N') AS SHIPPABLE_ROLE,                                                                                                                                                
NULL AS SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT,    /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/      
'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
cast (NULL as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT,
/*SCOOLA.PROMISE_DATE AS INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT, changes as part of OM-LSS*/
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AS INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,

CASE 
WHEN NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG IS NULL THEN ESOT.NAME 
WHEN NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOLVT.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME
WHEN NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'N' THEN ESOT.NAME
END SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, /* Changed as part of CE AUS Q3FY14 */ 

COALESCE (SCOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,                                                                                                                                                
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,                                                                                                                                      
'I' AS DML_TYPE  ,
-999  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY  ,  /* Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes,August release,2014*/                                                                                                                                      
COALESCE(SCOOLA.PRICING_QUANTITY,-999) AS PRICING_QTY , /*Added as part of EPS Data Subscription Qwin*/ 
/*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGE*/
COALESCE(SCOOLA.CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN')  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER
/*END*/

/* ADDING AS PART OF Q3FY15 SC-LSS */
/*,CASE WHEN  NSOVT.REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD ='ARRIVAL' THEN SCOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE ELSE NULL END  AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT  
,CASE WHEN NSOVT.REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD ='SHIP' THEN SCOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE ELSE NULL END  AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT */ 
,SCOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT
,SCOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT,
COALESCE (CASE 
WHEN  (ESOT.NAME = 'RMA-With-CR-AUS-L'  and ESOT.LANGUAGE_1 ='US') then 
SCOOLA.ordered_quantity * SCOOLA.unit_selling_price 
 WHEN (QLH.PRICE_LIST_CATEGORY_CD='TRADEIN'and opa.LIST_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'DIS') then 
DECODE (opa.PRICE_ADJ_APPLICATION_MTHD_CD,'AMT', opa.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT * scoola.ordered_quantity,'%',( (  opa.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT* scoola.unit_list_price)/ 100* scoola.ordered_quantity))
ELSE NULL 
END,0.0000) as TRADE_IN_CREDIT_USD_AMT,/*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/
COALESCE (CASE 
WHEN (NVL (SCOOLA.cancelled_flag, 'Y') <> 'Y') AND SCOOLA.line_category_code = 'ORDER' then 
CASE
WHEN   (ESOT.NAME = 'RMA-With-CR-AUS-L'   and ESOT.LANGUAGE_1 ='US') then NULL
ELSE 
SCOOLA.ordered_quantity * SCOOLA.unit_selling_price 
END 
END ,0.00000) 
AS PRE_TRADE_IN_USD_AMT ,/*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/
COALESCE (CASE 
WHEN (NVL (SCOOLA.cancelled_flag, 'Y') <>'Y') AND SCOOLA.line_category_code = 'RETURN' then 
CASE
WHEN   (ESOT.NAME = 'RMA-With-CR-AUS-L'   and ESOT.LANGUAGE_1 ='US') then NULL
ELSE 
SCOOLA.ordered_quantity * SCOOLA.unit_selling_price 
END 
END ,0.00000)
AS SO_LINE_RETURN_RMA_USD_AMT /*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/,
/* END*/
COALESCE(FEE_REF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS FEE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*agannava : added as part of Q3FY22 May Release*/
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA                                                                                                                                               
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT                                                                                                                                 
ON NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SCOOLA.LINE_ID                                                                                                                                             
AND NSOLT.SS_CODE='CG'                           
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT                                                                                                                                 
ON ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID=SCOOLA.LINE_TYPE_ID 
AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG'                                                                                                      
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_ASSEM                                                                                                                                     
ON  (NSOL_ASSEM.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SCOOLA.ATO_LINE_ID                                                                                                                                                 
AND NSOL_ASSEM.SS_CODE='CG')                                                                                                                                           
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   GOODS_LINE                                                                                                                                     
ON  (CAST (GOODS_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS VARCHAR(150))= SCOOLA.SERVICE_REFERENCE_LINE_ID                                                                                                                                            
AND GOODS_LINE.SS_CODE='CG'                                                                                                                                              
)                                                                                                                                              
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_SPLIT                                                                                                                                        
ON  (NSOL_SPLIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SCOOLA.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID                                                                                                                                   
AND NSOL_SPLIT.SS_CODE='CG')                                                                                                                                              
  
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_TOP                                                                                                                                          
ON  (NSOL_TOP.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SCOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID                                                                                                                                      
AND NSOL_TOP.SS_CODE='CG')                                                                                                                                 

LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_CONFIG                                                                                                                                  
ON  (NSOL_CONFIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SCOOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID                                                                                                                                      
AND NSOL_CONFIG.SS_CODE='CG')

LEFT JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT          
ON
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
/* Commented this join SC-LSS Q3FY15 
/* Adding join for N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV as a part  of SC-LSS Q3FY15    
LEFT JOIN  
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
ON  NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY   */
 /*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/
LEFT join (Select * from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ORDER BY   SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY  DESC)=1)OPA 
ON  OPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 and OPA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST_TV  QLH /*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/
on OPA.SK_LIST_HEADER_ID_INT=QLH.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES QLL /*Added as part Q1FY18 2nd November Release US131555 by shabakha*/
ON  QLL.LIST_HEADER_ID=QLH.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT  
and OPA.SK_LIST_LINE_ID_INT =QLL.LIST_LINE_ID	   

/**agannava: added as part of Q3FY22 May Release*/
 LEFT JOIN 
 (
 SELECT 
 EXT.FEE_REF_LINE_ID AS FEE_REF_LINE_ID,
 EXT.LINE_ID AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
 SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 FROM 
 $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT EXT,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
  WHERE  EXT.FEE_REF_LINE_ID = SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
 AND SOL.SS_CODE='CG' )FEE_REF
ON  FEE_REF.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SCOOLA.LINE_ID
